name: Release of Seized Real Estate to Debtor

eligibility.description: Taxpayers whose real estate was taken by the U.S. as payment or security for a tax debt, provided they pay the debt plus 1% monthly interest within 2 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A debtor can have seized real estate released back to them if the underlying tax debt and interest are paid within 2 years of acquisition.
